title: Floral Foam Bricks 23x11x8cm - Wet Foam Florist Grade - For Stunning Fresh & Artificial Flower Arrangements - (20, Wet Foam (Green))
features: VERSATILE WET & DRY FOAM OPTIONS: Select hydrating wet foam to prolong the life of fresh flowers or durable dry foam for secure artificial arrangements, offering flexibility for all your floral designs.

CONVENIENT PACK SIZES FOR ANY PROJECT: Available in packs of 1 , 2, 5, or 10, or a bulk box of 20, providing the perfect quantity for small crafts, large event displays, and professional florist needs.
Versatile 23x11x8cm FLORIST-GRADE BRICKS: These substantial foam bricks offer ample material for creating large, impactful floral arrangements, ensuring professional results every time.
EFFORTLESS CUSTOMIZATION WITH EASY CUTTING & SHAPING: Adapt these foam bricks to any container with ease, allowing for precise design execution and perfect fits for any vessel.
MAXIMIZE FRESH FLOWER LONGEVITY WITH SUPERIOR HYDRATION (WET): The high-quality wet foam ensures optimal water retention, keeping fresh blooms vibrant and extending their lifespan, minimizing waste.

PROVIDE UNWAVERING SUPPORT FOR ARTIFICIAL DISPLAYS (DRY): The dense dry foam offers a stable and secure base for intricate artificial flower designs, maintaining their form and visual impact throughout any event.
description: Product Description Wet foam bricks, 20 per box - priced per box (x20). A box of 20 wet foam floral bricks. Sold per case for best value. Box Contains Bulk Case of 20 Floral Foam Wet Bricks
